name: @speedora/primary-subject
description: Stateless module (JSON-in/JSON-out): Primary Subject Selection - decides which tracked entity is 'the subject' of a given sampled instant (active speaker > largest visible face > largest tracked person > highest objectAttentionScore > largest tracked object), over Facial/Active-Speaker/Object Intelligence's already-computed output. Deliberately NOT composition-specific (see docs/ai/composition-intelligence.md) - a standalone building block also intended for Thumbnail Intelligence, Reframe, and future Multi-Subject work, not buried as a private detail of any one consumer. selectPrimarySubject() never detects/tracks anything itself, only chooses among already-tracked candidates. No DB/queue access at all; see root ARCHITECTURE.md. Consumed by apps/worker's render-clip adapter and @speedora/composition-intelligence.
